## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup

## Related Issues

Closes #___

## Checklist

### Tests
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ --ds=core.test_settings -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Test coverage maintained or improved

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] No new linting errors or warnings introduced

### Documentation
- [ ] Updated README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated CONTRIBUTING.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated docstrings for new functions or classes

### Infrastructure
- [ ] Changes are compatible with the existing Docker setup
- [ ] Environment variable changes are reflected in `.env.example`
- [ ] No breaking changes to the API contract

## Screenshots / Demo

If applicable, add screenshots or a short demo of the changes.
